init_eqs_str: a['vol_now'] = 0; a['vol_mean'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['sinbeat'] = 0; a['basseffect'] = 0; a['beatcount'] = 0; a['initframe'] = 0; a['rozzorrate'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['vol_now']=((0.4*a['bass'])+(0.1*((a['bass_att']+a['treb'])+a['mid']))); a['vol_mean']=((Math.abs(equal(mod(a['frame'],50), 0))>0.00001)?((a['vol_mean']-(0.5*(a['vol_mean']-a['vol_now'])))):((0.1*((a['vol_mean']*9)+a['vol_now'])))); a['beat']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol_now'], (1.15*a['vol_mean'])))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['sinbeat']=Math.sin((a['beat']*(a['vol_now']-a['vol_mean']))); a['warp']=0; a['basseffect']=Math.max((Math.max(a['bass'], a['bass_att'])-1), 0); a['mv_y']=(4-Math.min((((a['bass_att']+a['bass'])-2)*0.25), 0.9)); a['mv_r']=(a['basseffect']*4); a['mv_b']=(a['basseffect']*3); a['mv_g']=(a['basseffect']*3.5); a['wave_y']=((Math.abs(a['beat'])>0.00001)?(0.5):(0.4)); a['ib_a']=a['sinbeat']; a['beatcount']=(a['beatcount']+a['beat']); a['initframe']=((Math.abs(below(a['beatcount'], 1))>0.00001)?(a['frame']):(a['initframe'])); a['rozzorrate']=div((a['frame']-a['initframe']),a['beatcount']);
